items.title: S01E01 - Alien Nation: The TV Movie
items.summary: When the Francisco family move into a rich suburban part of L.A., they get to experice hate and racism spread by the radical Purists.

infolabels.title: Alien Nation: The TV Movie
infolabels.plot: When the Francisco family move into a rich suburban part of L.A., they get to experice hate and racism spread by the radical Purists.

items.title: S01E02 - Fountain of Youth
items.summary: Sikes and Francisco (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) investigate a doctor who is killing Newcomers to benefit human patients.

infolabels.title: Fountain of Youth
infolabels.plot: Sikes and Francisco (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) investigate a doctor who is killing Newcomers to benefit human patients.

items.title: S01E03 - Little Lost Lamb
items.summary: Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) uncover a prostitution ring after a Newcomer prostitute, on the run from her pimp, is murdered in Sikes' apartment.

infolabels.title: Little Lost Lamb
infolabels.plot: Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) uncover a prostitution ring after a Newcomer prostitute, on the run from her pimp, is murdered in Sikes' apartment.

items.title: S01E04 - Fifteen with Wanda
items.summary: Sikes' (Gary Graham) daughter (Cheryl Pollak) visits, accompanied by her radical boyfriend (Wayne Pere), and Buck Francisco (Sean Six) faces expulsion from school. With Eric Pierpoint.

infolabels.title: Fifteen with Wanda
infolabels.plot: Sikes' (Gary Graham) daughter (Cheryl Pollak) visits, accompanied by her radical boyfriend (Wayne Pere), and Buck Francisco (Sean Six) faces expulsion from school. With Eric Pierpoint.

items.title: S01E05 - The Takeover
items.summary: During heavy rioting, the precinct is near deserted & Sikes & Francisco must stop criminals who attempt to take the precinct over and raiding the evidence lockers for drugs, money and weaponry.

infolabels.title: The Takeover
infolabels.plot: During heavy rioting, the precinct is near deserted & Sikes & Francisco must stop criminals who attempt to take the precinct over and raiding the evidence lockers for drugs, money and weaponry.

items.title: S01E06 - The First Cigar
items.summary: George (Eric Pierpoint) accepts a loan from a Newcomer loan officer before discovering she is a drug czar

infolabels.title: The First Cigar
infolabels.plot: George (Eric Pierpoint) accepts a loan from a Newcomer loan officer before discovering she is a drug czar

items.title: S01E07 - Night of the Screams
items.summary: The method of a serial killer stalking Newcomers re-creates one of their most grisly legends.

infolabels.title: Night of the Screams
infolabels.plot: The method of a serial killer stalking Newcomers re-creates one of their most grisly legends.

items.title: S01E08 - Contact
items.summary: While investigating a famous doctor's murder, Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) discover he was attempting to contact a probe seeking the Newcomer slave ship.

infolabels.title: Contact
infolabels.plot: While investigating a famous doctor's murder, Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) discover he was attempting to contact a probe seeking the Newcomer slave ship.

items.title: S01E09 - Three to Tango
items.summary: George and Sikes (Eric Pierpoint, Gary Graham) search for a Purist radical who has been murdering special Newcomers.

infolabels.title: Three to Tango
infolabels.plot: George and Sikes (Eric Pierpoint, Gary Graham) search for a Purist radical who has been murdering special Newcomers.

items.title: S01E10 - The Game
items.summary: George is confronted with his past as a slave on the spaceship, when it appears that an old Russian Roulette style game he was once forced to play has returned. Will George take revenge for his brother, who died being hit by a bolt of salt water while playing the game on the ship?

infolabels.title: The Game
infolabels.plot: George is confronted with his past as a slave on the spaceship, when it appears that an old Russian Roulette style game he was once forced to play has returned. Will George take revenge for his brother, who died being hit by a bolt of salt water while playing the game on the ship?

items.title: S01E11 - Chains of Love
items.summary: George (Eric Pierpoint) goes under cover as a client at a computer-dating service for Newcomers to locate a female Newcomer killer.

infolabels.title: Chains of Love
infolabels.plot: George (Eric Pierpoint) goes under cover as a client at a computer-dating service for Newcomers to locate a female Newcomer killer.

items.title: S01E12 - The Red Room
items.summary: Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) become involved in a federal search for a Newcomer who was programmed to kill while in the quarantine camps.

infolabels.title: The Red Room
infolabels.plot: Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) become involved in a federal search for a Newcomer who was programmed to kill while in the quarantine camps.

items.title: S01E13 - The Spirit of '95
items.summary: George and Sikes (Eric Pierpoint, Gary Graham) discover a Purist plot to sabotage an election while investigating the bombing of a Newcomer voter campaign office.

items.title: S01E14 - Generation to Generation
items.summary: Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) follow the trail of a mysterious Tenctonese box which is deadly for those who fail to comprehend its powers.

items.summary: Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) trail a man (Hugh MacGuire) who is obsessed with a Tenctonese porn star (Deborah Goodrich).

infolabels.plot: Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) trail a man (Hugh MacGuire) who is obsessed with a Tenctonese porn star (Deborah Goodrich).

items.title: S01E16 - Partners
items.summary: Sikes (Gary Graham) attempts to prove George (Eric Pierpoint) innocent in a drug case as Susan (Michele Scarabelli) prepares to transfer the pod to her husband.

items.summary: A violent confrontation with a drug suspect (A.D. Muylch) causes George (Eric Pierpoint) to give birth prematurely.

items.summary: Sikes (Gary Graham) vows to capture a serial murderer who once eluded him when it appears he has killed again.

items.title: S01E21 - The Touch
items.summary: Sikes and George (Gray Graham, Eric Pierpoint) uncover an overseer rejuvenation plot when they investigate the dramatic behavior change of a boy (Mitchell Allen, Jonathan Brandis) Cathy (Terri Treas) knew on the slaveship.

items.title: S01E22 - Green Eyes
items.summary: While investigating a series of mysterious Newcomer deaths, Sikes and George (Gary Graham, Eric Pierpoint) discover a plan to eliminate the Newcomer population with a lethal bacteria.
